headline: GE Keeps Climbing. Should You Climb On?
summary: This jet engine giant is in a clear uptrend, but after such a powerful run, investors must ask if the price of admission already accounts for the quality of the flight.

raw.headline: GE Keeps Climbing. Should You Climb On?
raw.summary: This jet engine giant is in a clear uptrend, but after such a powerful run, investors must ask if the price of admission already accounts for the quality of the flight.

headline: Why Honeywell’s New Earnings Guidance Isn’t as Good as It Looks
summary: Honeywell Technologies  made a big adjustment to its financial guidance.  The automation company said late Wednesday that it now expects full-year earnings per share of between $7.90 and $8.30, from a prior range of $3.95 to $4.15.  Investors should remember that Wall Street analysts don’t update numbers every day.

headline: HON Stock Gains Overnight: Will The Updated Outlook Revive Interest In The Automation Giant?
summary: Honeywell revised 2026 guidance for its reverse stock split, as investors reassess its industrial automation business ahead of earnings.
